name: activate_pim_group
description: Activate an Azure PIM group assignment for this session. Only groups pre-configured on the session can be activated.

group_id.description: Entra group ID (UUID) to activate — must be one of the session's configured PIM groups

justification.description: Reason for activating this group (defaults to 'Agent session access')

name: deactivate_pim_group
description: Deactivate an Azure PIM group assignment for this session.

name: list_pim_activations
description: List currently active PIM group assignments for this session's user.

name: activate_pim_role
description: Activate an Azure RBAC role assignment via PIM. Only roles pre-configured on the profile can be activated.

role_definition_id.description: Role definition UUID (e.g. 73c42c96-874c-492b-b04d-ab87d138a893 for Log Analytics Reader)

justification.description: Reason for activating this role (defaults to 'Agent session access')

name: deactivate_pim_role
description: Deactivate an Azure RBAC role assignment via PIM.
